segments.text: Sing aloud to God our strength; shout for joy to the God of Jacob!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Raise a song; sound the tambourine, the pleasant lyre with the harp.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Blow the trumpet at the new moon, at the full moon, on our feast day.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For it is a statute for Israel, a rule of the God of Jacob.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He made it a decree in Joseph when he went out over the land of Egypt.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I heard a language I had not known: 'I relieved your shoulder of the burden; your hands were freed from the basket.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: 'In distress you called, and I delivered you; I answered you in the secret place of thunder; I tested you at the waters of Meribah.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Hear, O my people, while I admonish you! O Israel, if you would but listen to me!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: There shall be no strange god among you; you shall not bow down to a foreign god.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I am the Lord your God, who brought you up out of the land of Egypt. Open your mouth wide, and I will fill it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But my people did not listen to my voice; Israel would not submit to me.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: unto…: or, to the hardness of their hearts, or, imagination

segments.text: So I gave them over to their stubborn hearts, to follow their own counsels.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Oh, that my people would listen to me, that Israel would walk in my ways!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I would soon subdue their enemies and turn my hand against their foes.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: submitted…: or, yielded feigned obedience: Heb. lied

segments.text: Those who hate the Lord would cringe toward him, and their fate would be forever.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He would feed you with the finest of the wheat, and with honey from the rock I would satisfy you.
segments.speaker: God
